name: codeforge-pmo
description: codeforge ζ arc PMO lane plugin (CFP-36) — Epic 분해 보조 · Story 완료 회고 감사 · Cross-Story 패턴 분석 · ADR 후보 발의 + docs/retros/ direct write + Story §11 self-write + Epic milestone 관리 · GitOpsAgent git-ops-event-v1 canonical producer (CFP-139). codeforge core 의존. + CFP-534 ADR-050 Amendment 1 GitOpsAgent intersection 로직 확장 (cross-section conflict detection). + CFP-597 GitOpsAgent §3.6 marketplace sync proactive PR dispatch (ADR-063 Amendment 1, 2026-05-13). + CFP-777 (Epic #761 Story-1, 2026-05-16) — DialogFidelityAgent 신규 cross-cutting read-only verifier (세션 요건·대화 결정 fidelity, verifier-narrower-than-generator, ADR-071 Amendment 1 external verifier auxiliary layer / ADR-042 Amendment 6 Opus pilot tier). agent count 2→3. + CFP-1764 Story-3 (ADR-071 Amendment 8 horizontal axis 자매, 2026-05-27) — PMOAgent prompt template 본문에 평이 어휘 의무 directive 추가 (codename → 평이 어휘 lookup + 치환, lookup SSOT = wrapper docs/wording-dictionary.md 카테고리 (c) 15 batch). retro / Epic 분해 / Cross-Story 패턴 보고 산출물 안 사용자 dialog paste 영역 jargon leak 차단.
